title: South-facing ranger sword attack
prompt: Use the approved identity master of a compact forest ranger with a moss-green hood, tan tunic, brown boots, a small round wooden buckler on the left arm, and a short iron sword in the right hand. Keep the ranger facing south and preserve face, body proportions, clothing, equipment hands, palette, outline, and foot root. Create a one-shot sword attack with ordered motion beats: anticipation, wind-up, strike, impact, recovery, return. The weapon accelerates into one readable impact peak and remains in the right hand; the shield remains on the left arm. The body returns to its grounded ready pose after recovery; this is an attack, not six unrelated weapon poses. Crisp 32x32 pixel art per frame, transparent background, no text, no frame border.

beats.semantic: weight shifts away from the target before the swing
sword draws back while feet remain anchored to the root
sword crosses forward with the largest directional motion
attack reaches its clearest extension and visual impact peak
weapon and torso recoil from the impact without identity drift
ranger returns to the grounded ready pose
